hero.title: Make your money
hero.subtitle: Cais is an investment advisory office accredited by BTG Pactual. We help you invest safely, without jargon and with a personalized strategy.

about.label: About Us
about.title: We are your investment office
about.subtitle: We are not a bank. We are not a broker. We are advisors — certified professionals who work for your interest, not the bank's.
about.body: Cais Investimentos was created with a clear mission: to make the best market investments accessible to everyone. With over 30 years of accumulated experience and the security of being an accredited BTG Pactual partner, we help families and businesses make money work the right way.
about.differentiator: An investment advisor is different from a bank manager: they have no product targets to hit. They work for you.

pillars.title: Certified Expertise
pillars.description: Our team holds CEA and CFP® certifications, the most recognized in the Brazilian financial market, plus an FGV MBA.

pillars.title: BTG Pactual Partner
pillars.description: You invest with the security and solidity of Latin America's largest investment bank, with full transparency.

pillars.title: Real Service
pillars.description: You have a dedicated advisor who knows your story, your goals, and is always available when you need them.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: From first contact to wealth growth
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple and transparent process — for first-time investors and experienced ones alike.

steps.title: Initial conversation
steps.description: You talk to one of our advisors via WhatsApp, without commitment or cost. We listen to your situation.

steps.title: Free diagnosis
steps.description: We analyze your current financial situation, your life goals, and how much risk you want to take.

steps.title: Personalized strategy
steps.description: We build an investment plan with clear recommendations, no jargon, made exclusively for you.

steps.title: Continuous monitoring
steps.description: We monitor your investments and adjust your portfolio when needed. You always know where every dollar is.

services.title: For you and your company
services.subtitle: Personalized investment strategies for every life stage and financial goal

personal.title: Personal Investment Advisory
personal.description: For those who want their money to grow safely — whether for retirement, buying a property, or building long-term wealth.

corporate.title: Corporate Investment Advisory
corporate.description: For companies that want to optimize idle cash and make capital work intelligently, safely and profitably.

education.label: Financial Education
education.title: How much can your money grow with professional advisory?
education.subtitle: Many people leave money sitting in savings without knowing there are better options — equally safe and far more profitable.
education.example: Illustrative example: R$ 100,000 invested over 5 years
education.disclaimer: Returns are estimated for educational and illustrative purposes. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Consult an advisor for personalized strategies.
education.whatIsBody: "Leveraging your wealth" means making your money earn more — without necessarily taking more risk. With professional guidance, you access quality financial products, diversify intelligently, and take advantage of opportunities most people don't even know exist.

features.ctaText: Ready to take the first step?

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Questions? We explain.
faq.subtitle: We answer the questions we receive most from people thinking about investing with Cais.

items.question: What is an investment advisory office?
items.answer: It's a company of certified professionals who help you choose the best investments for your profile. Unlike a bank manager, an investment advisor has no product targets to hit — they work for your interest.

items.question: Do I need a lot of money to start?
items.answer: There is no fixed minimum. We work with clients at different financial stages. The most important thing is to start — and Cais will help you define the right path for your reality.

items.question: Is my money safe?
items.answer: Yes. Your investments are held at BTG Pactual, Latin America's largest investment bank, regulated by the Central Bank. Cais is your advisor — it does not have direct access to your money, only guides where to invest.

items.question: How does the partnership with BTG Pactual work?
items.answer: We are an office accredited by BTG Pactual. You open an account at BTG (free and online), and we at Cais are your advisors: we monitor, recommend investments and manage your portfolio.

items.question: Does Cais serve clients anywhere in Brazil?
items.answer: Yes. We have physical offices in Santa Maria de Jetibá (ES) and Recife (PE), but we serve clients throughout Brazil via WhatsApp, phone and video call.

items.question: How often do I receive updates about my investments?
items.answer: You have real-time access to the BTG Pactual platform, 24 hours a day. Additionally, our advisors send monthly reports and are available to talk whenever you need.

footer.description: Personalized investment advisory for individuals and companies across Brazil.
footer.disclaimer: Cais Investimentos Assessor De Investimento Ltda, registered under CNPJ No. 49.404.040/0001-98, is an investment advisory company duly registered with the Comissão de Valores Mobiliários (CVM) pursuant to CVM Resolution 178. Operating in the financial market as an agent of Banco BTG Pactual S/A, which can be verified through the ANCORD website (<ancordLink>https://www.ancord.org.br/certificacao-e-credenciamento/</ancordLink>) or through the Necton Investimentos website (<nectonLink>https://www.necton.com.br/seja-parceiro/</nectonLink>). Banco BTG Pactual S/A is a financial institution that is part of the securities distribution system, acting as an intermediary for its clients' transactions. Under CVM regulations, the investment advisor cannot manage or administer investors' assets, as it is an agent of the intermediary and depends on prior client authorization to carry out transactions in the financial market. In derivatives transactions, there is a possibility of significant financial losses, even exceeding the amounts invested. The advisory may carry out other activities related to the financial, capital markets, insurance, pension and capitalization sectors. Past performance does not guarantee future results. For complaints, please contact the Ombudsman of Banco BTG Pactual S/A at 0800-722-0048.
